title: Junior Investment Banker at SIDBI Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Junior Investment Banker at SIDBI Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
SIDBI Ventures Solutions is actively seeking a talented and motivated Investment Banker to join our dynamic team in Vijayawada. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About SIDBI Ventures Solutions:
SIDBI Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SIDBI Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
